hooks.command: echo '=== QANUN DEV SESSION ===' && echo 'Current branch:' $(git branch --show-current) && echo 'Last commit:' $(git log --oneline -1) && echo 'Test status:' $(python -m pytest --co -q 2>/dev/null | tail -1)

hooks.prompt: Run pytest. If all tests pass, respond with ok. If any fail, respond with the failures. This is a sprint gate — the session cannot end with failing tests. $ARGUMENTS

hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.(tsx?|jsx?)$'; then npx eslint --fix "$(echo $TOOL_INPUT | jq -r .file_path)" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r .command | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf|DROP\s+TABLE|TRUNCATE'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive command detected' >&2; exit 2; fi
